overall.description: A samurai warrior walks through a vast field of red spider lilies during a golden sunset. The third-person gameplay footage shows the character traversing grass and shallow water streams in a misty, atmospheric natural landscape reminiscent of Ghost of Tsushima.

scene_state.functional_zone: field of red spider lilies at sunset

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily through the tall red flowers toward the distant sunset

entered.detail: dense field of red spider lilies covering the ground in all directions
silhouetted forest trees on the horizon against the sunset
bright orange and pink sunset light filtering through mist
low-lying atmospheric fog hovering above the flower field
group of tall trees on the left side of the field

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a vast sea of red spider lilies bathed in golden sunset light. Mist hovers above the flowers as the camera follows from behind, with a distant tree line silhouetted against the colorful sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream winding through red flower field

events.description: character steps from grass into shallow water stream, creating ripples around feet

agents.ego_description: walking through the shallow water, creating ripples and splashes as the sun reflects off the surface

entered.detail: calm shallow water reflecting the sunset colors, with lily pads floating on surface
golden reflection of the setting sun shimmering on the water surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow stream winding through the flower field. Water ripples around the samurai's feet while the red flowers line the banks on either side. The sunset reflects brilliantly on the water's surface as the journey continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: red flower field approaching the sunset horizon

events.description: character exits the water stream and returns to walking on grass through the flowers

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey through the flower field toward the setting sun, moving away from the stream

entered.detail: tall pine trees standing on the right side of the field against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Leaving the stream behind, the samurai continues through the dense red flowers toward the glowing sunset. Tall trees appear on the right horizon as the character approaches the distant tree line, with the warm light growing more intense.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast field of red spider lilies that transitions from a misty floral sea into a reflective waterway and finally toward a distant forest. It begins with the samurai walking through dense red blossoms bathed in golden sunset light, with a light mist hovering over the flowers and a silhouetted tree line in the distance. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a shallow, winding stream where the sunset reflects brilliantly on the rippling water surface between banks of red lilies. The camera then follows the samurai as he leaves the water behind to traverse the flowers once more, moving toward the glowing horizon. The journey concludes as the warm light intensifies and the character approaches the tall trees emerging on the right horizon.
